message:
test(main): add provider_from_token tests; suppress clippy on handle_slash_model

Add comprehensive test coverage for the provider_from_token() function:
- Numbered choices (1-10) map to correct canonical provider IDs
- Out-of-range numbers (0, 11) return None
- Common nicknames resolve correctly (claude→anthropic, gpt→openai, etc.)
- Canonical IDs pass through unchanged

Also add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to handle_slash_model() which
grew past the clippy threshold from prior slash command extraction work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
